# NCU Report Skill

For CUDA kernel profiling with Nsight Compute on B200/sm_100, use the external `ncu-report-skill` repository as the source of truth.

This repo intentionally does not copy or duplicate the profiling skill content. Configure the concrete repository URL in your local environment, private docs, or installation notes.

Source: https://github.com/mit-han-lab/ncu-report-skill
